intro: Google is expanding free access to Gemini's image generation capabilities for US users, drawing from Gmail, Photos, and Search data. Meanwhile, Google has restricted Meta's usage of Gemini models due to compute shortages, underscoring infrastructure constraints as AI demand accelerates. Anthropic secured a deal with California's government to provide Claude at a 50% discount, while Arena, the crowdsourced AI leaderboard, reached $100 million in annualized revenue from its paid evaluation service.

whitelist.title: AI - Business Insider
